title: Tito's Watermelon Smash
description: Fresh muddled watermelon and lime with Tito's Vodka over ice. Bright, fruity, and perfectly balanced — no syrup needed.

ingredients.item: small watermelon wedge, lime wheel, and ice

steps.instruction: In a cocktail shaker, add the watermelon cubes and lime juice. Muddle firmly until the watermelon is fully broken down and juicy.
Add Tito's Vodka and a handful of ice to the shaker.
Double-strain into a glass filled with fresh ice — straining through a fine mesh removes all pulp.
Top with club soda and stir gently once.
Garnish with a small watermelon wedge and lime wheel.

notes: The sweetness of the watermelon means you don't need any added sugar or syrup. For best results, use ripe, sweet watermelon — taste a piece before you start.
